_format: verb ct; oracle reply verbatim (never hand-edited). 'OK <hex>' = ContractTemplate.serializer.toBytes(SigmaTemplateCompiler(NET).compile(source)) as Base16; 'REJECT <line:col> <ExClass>'.
_source: TyperOracle.scala ct verb, scala-cli sigma-state 6.0.2 (Scala 2.12.21, JVM 17), ORACLE_TREE_VERSION=3, ORACLE_NETWORK=testnet. Sources under test-vectors/ergoscript/contract/sources/.
_note: M7 byte-exact target is the <=4-param ACCEPT class. The 'five_params' vector is an oracle-ACCEPT the Rust twin DEFERS (>=5 params => JVM-HashMap placeholder-order port, TODO M7-hashmap-order): compile_contract must REJECT it with ContractError::TooManyParamsForOrdering, NOT byte-match. The 'returns_with_text' vector is an oracle-REJECT (returnTag consumes only the bare '@returns' literal, trailing text fails the docLine Newline).

vectors.name: bare_no_params
five_params
vectors.source:
/**
 * Five params — exercises the deferred HashMap-order path.
 * @param a a
 * @param b b
 * @param c c
 * @param d d
 * @param e e
 */
@contract def gate5(a: Int, b: Int, c: Int, d: Int, e: Int) = sigmaProp(a + b + c + d + e > 0)

vectors.name: four_params
vectors.source:
/**
 * Four-parameter arithmetic gate.
 * @param a first
 * @param b second
 * @param c third
 * @param d fourth
 */
@contract def gate4(a: Int, b: Int, c: Int, d: Int) = sigmaProp(a + b + c + d > 0)

one_param_no_default
one_param_with_default
returns_with_text
two_params
two_params_bool
two_params_with_defaults
unsupported_tag
vectors.source:
/**
 * Uses an unsupported tag.
 * @author someone
 * @param threshold the minimum height
 * @returns
 */
@contract def tagged(threshold: Int) = sigmaProp(HEIGHT > threshold)
